subject: Physics
chapter: Exploring the Investigative World of Science

activities_projects.title: Curiosity Question Wall
activities_projects.objective: Encourage students to ask scientific questions
steps: Write a science question you are curious about
Stick it on the class chart
Discuss possible answers with classmates
activities_projects.evaluation: Participation and relevance of question (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Kitchen Science Observation
activities_projects.objective: Observe scientific phenomena in daily life
steps: Observe something interesting in the kitchen (e.g., boiling water)
Write what you see happening
Write one scientific question about it

activities_projects.title: Simple Experiment Design
steps: Choose a simple question like 'Does warm water dissolve sugar faster?'
Write the steps to test it
Record your expected result

activities_projects.title: Observation vs Inference
steps: Look at a simple picture or object
Write what you observe
Write what you think it means

activities_projects.title: Daily Science Diary
steps: Observe one science-related event each day
Write what happened
Write why you think it happened

activities_projects.title: Scientific Tools Around Us
activities_projects.objective: Identify common tools used in science
steps: List tools used in science experiments
Write where they are used
Explain their purpose

activities_projects.title: Puri Puff Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Understand how scientists investigate everyday phenomena
steps: Observe how a puri or chapati puffs while cooking
Write possible reasons
Suggest one way to test your idea
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Applies scientific thinking to daily life

activities_projects.title: Question–Hypothesis Match
steps: Write three science questions
Write a possible answer (hypothesis) for each
Explain how you could test it

activities_projects.title: Observe and Record
steps: Observe a melting ice cube
Record time taken to melt
Write changes you notice

activities_projects.title: Young Scientist Poster
activities_projects.objective: Understand the role of curiosity in science
steps: Draw a poster showing how scientists investigate
Include steps like observation, question, experiment
Present the poster in class
